fact: Vasco da Gama landed here in 1498! 🐔 Kozhi(Chicken) + 🧥 Coat = Kozhikode
Gateway to Kerala via the Palakkad Gap in the Western Ghats. 🥛 Paal(Milk) + 🌲 Kadu(Forest) = Palakkad
Home to Edakkal Caves with carvings from 6000 BCE! 🌾 Vayal(Paddy field) + 🗺️ Nadu(Land) = Wayanad
Home to Asia's largest arch dam! 🤏 Idukku(Narrow/Pinch) + 🔑 Key = Idukki
India's first fully literate district! 🏰 Kotta(Fort) + 🏠 Akam(Inside) = Kottayam
Land of the mystical Theyyam ritual — 2000 years old! 👁️ Kannu(Eye) + 🚪 Ur/Door(Town) = Kannur
Famous for Kottakkal Arya Vaidya Sala, a 100-year-old Ayurvedic institution. ⛰️ Mala(Hill) + 🏯 Puram(Fort/City) = Malappuram
Historic port called the 'Mecca of Kerala' — home to one of Asia's oldest mosques. 🪙 Pon(Gold) + 🐘 Aana(Elephant) = Ponnani
The Venice of the East! Nehru Trophy Boat Race since 1952. 🌊 Ala(Wave) + 🛶 Puzha(River) = Alappuzha
Cultural capital of Kerala — 100 elephants at the famous Pooram! 3️⃣ Thri(Three) + ⛪ Soor(Divine) = Thrissur
A sweet little town on the Periyar riverbank! The name sounds exactly like the beloved Indian sweet 'Halwa'! 🍮 Halwa → Aluva
Misty paradise at 1600m — home to the world's highest tea gardens! 3️⃣ Moonu(Three) + ⛰️ Aar(River/Peak) = Munnar
Pilgrimage capital of Kerala — gateway to Sabarimala! 🥣 Pathram(Vessel) + 🧱 Thitta(Platform) = Pathanamthitta
Guruvayur Sri Krishna Temple! Elephants here are named after ancient kings. 👨‍🏫 Guru(Teacher) + 🌬️ Vayu(Wind God) = Guruvayur
Breathtaking backwater village on Vembanad Lake! 👦 Kumaran(Young man) + 🏘️ Kom(Village) = Kumarakom
Cashew capital of the world! 70% of India's cashew is processed here. ⚡ Kol(Power/strength) + 🏠 Am(place) = Kollam
Cliff-beach town with natural mineral springs that have therapeutic properties. 🪨 Varku(Rock/cliff) + 🌊 Ala(Wave) = Varkala
Iconic crescent beach near Thiruvananthapuram — Kerala tourism was born here! 🥥 Kochu(Small) + 🌊 Alam(Grove/Land) ≈ Kovalam
Birthplace of Thalassery Biryani AND Kerala circus! Circus arts were developed here in the 1800s. 🎂 Thalas(sweet/tasty) + 🎪 Sery(place) = Thalassery
7 languages spoken in this northernmost Kerala district! Home to Bekal Fort — Kerala's largest. 🏯 Kasara(Fort) + 🐄 Godu(Cattle) = Kasargod
India's financial capital handles 70% of maritime trade! Named after Mumbadevi, the patron goddess.
Capital of India, 3000+ years of history! Destroyed and rebuilt 8 times. More trees per km² than any major city.
Silicon Valley of India! Name means 'town of boiled beans' (Benda Kalu Ooru).
India's first railway station opened here in 1853! Marina Beach is the world's longest urban beach at 13km.
City of Joy! Howrah Bridge was built WITHOUT a single nut or bolt — held together purely by rivets.
Pearl City of India! Hyderabadi Biryani has a 400-year-old recipe.
The Pink City! All buildings were painted terracotta pink in 1876 to welcome Prince Albert of Wales.
One of the world's oldest continuously inhabited cities — over 3000 years! Mark Twain called it 'older than history'.
Home to the Golden Temple! It serves free food (langar) to 100,000 people every single day.
India's smallest state! Has more churches per sq km than anywhere in Asia after 450 years of Portuguese rule.
Released in 1975, Sholay ran continuously for 5 YEARS in a Mumbai cinema! 'Kitne aadmi the?' is cinema's most quoted line.
Ran for 25 consecutive years at Mumbai's Maratha Mandir! Shah Rukh Khan improvised the iconic outstretched arm scene.
Became Bollywood's highest-grossing film at the time! Aamir Khan's character name 'Rancho' still inspires millions.
Based on the true story of Mahavir Singh Phogat's daughters winning Commonwealth gold. Aamir Khan gained 25kg for the role!
Oscar-nominated 2001 film! Indian villagers challenge British officers to cricket to avoid paying oppressive taxes.
Took 15 years to make! The iconic 'Pyaar Kiya To Darna Kya' scene used 150,000 mirrors.
Changed how Bollywood portrays male friendship! Farhan Akhtar's directorial debut. Shot in Goa and Sydney.
Kangana Ranaut won National Award for Best Actress! Woman travels Paris & Amsterdam alone after fiancé abandons her.
Karan Johar's debut swept 8 Filmfare Awards! SRK wore a skirt-like lungi throughout the college scenes.
Shot entirely in Spain! Title means 'You won't get life again'. All the adventure scenes — skydiving, bullfight — were real.
James Cameron drew all of Jack's sketches himself! The film's budget exceeded the cost of building the actual Titanic.
Based on Shakespeare's Hamlet! 'Hakuna Matata' means No Worries in Swahili. The wildebeest stampede took 3 years to animate.
J.K. Rowling conceived the story on a delayed train! The series has sold over 500 million copies worldwide.
Christopher Nolan wrote the script over 10 years! The spinning top wasn't Cobb's totem — his wedding ring was. Watch for it!
Heath Ledger won a posthumous Oscar for the Joker. He stayed IN CHARACTER between takes and kept a method-acting diary.
Tom Hanks earned $65M through profit participation! The feather CGI in the opening scene was considered revolutionary.
The T-Rex's roar was crafted from a baby elephant's cry, a tiger's snarl, an alligator's hiss, and a penguin's squawk!
Macaulay Culkin was only 10! It held the record for highest-grossing comedy for 27 years. The tarantula was real.
Nemo means 'no one' in Latin! Pixar animators got scuba-certified to research marine life. Clownfish sales spiked 40%.
Became the highest-grossing film EVER! The 'Portals' scene was filmed over 11 days with 1000+ extras.
Called the King of Rice Dishes! The word comes from Persian 'Birian' (fried before cooking) + 'Brinja' (rice). 👑 King + 🍚 Rice + 🏺 Royal Pot = Biryani
Ma(mom) + Sala(room in Urdu) = Masala! Do+Sa = the first two musical notes = Dosa! 👩 Ma + 🏠 Sala + 🎵 Do-Sa = Masala Dosa
Originally 'Sanbusak' in 10th-century Arab cookbooks! Its triangular shape IS the clue — the name sounds like 'same-oh-sa'. 🔺 Triangle + 🥔 Potato + 🫛 Peas = Samosa
Invented by ACCIDENT in 1947! A Delhi chef mixed leftover tandoori chicken into a tomato-butter sauce. Now India's most exported dish. 🧈 Makhan(Butter) + 🍗 Murgh(Chicken) = Butter Chicken
Called Gol Gappa in Delhi, Puchka in Kolkata! Said to originate in ancient Magadha 2000+ years ago. 💧 Pani(Water) + 🎈 Puri(hollow balloon-bread) = Pani Puri
Ancient Tamil texts from 920 CE mention it! The 12-hour fermentation makes it probiotic. 🕌 Id(Eid festival, sounds like 'Id') + 🥋 Li(Lee, as in Bruce Lee) = Id-Li = Idli
A Delhi power breakfast! Bhature dough ferments overnight — the puffiness comes from steam trapped when deep-fried. 🫘 Chole(Chickpeas) + 💨 Bhature(Puffed up) = Chole Bhature
Kolkata & Odisha fought a decades-long legal battle over its origin! Odisha won the GI tag in 2019. 💧 Ras(Juice/Essence in Bengali) + ⚽ Gulla(Ball) = Rasgulla
Invented in 1850s Mumbai to feed textile mill workers quickly! 🍞 Pav(Bread, from Portuguese 'pão') + 🥗 Bhaji(Vegetable mash) = Pav Bhaji
A Kerala breakfast with a spongy centre and lacy crispy edges! 🧔 Appa(Father in Tamil) + 🌅 Morning = Appa's breakfast = Appam
Spinach + fresh cheese — a nutritious powerhouse! 🥬 Palak(Spinach in Hindi) + 🧀 Paneer(Fresh cheese in Hindi/Persian) = Palak Paneer
Black lentils slow-cooked overnight in butter and cream. 🫘 Dal(Lentils in Hindi) + 🧈 Makhani(Buttery, from Makhan=butter) = Dal Makhani
A fragrant Kashmiri lamb curry! 🛢️ Rogan(Fat/Oil in Persian) + 🔥 Josh(Heat/Passion in Persian & Urdu) = Rogan Josh
Flattened rice sautéed with onions and peanuts — a light Central India breakfast. 🐻 Poh(like Winnie-the-Pooh!) + 😄 Ha(laughter) = Po-Ha = Poha!
A Kerala breakfast staple served with Puttu or Appam! 🖤 Kadala(Black chickpeas in Malayalam) + 🥥 Coconut gravy = Kadala Curry
Mumbai's most beloved street food — eaten by millions daily! 🤝 Vada/Wada(Promise in Hindi) + 🍞 Pav(Bread, from Portuguese 'pão') = Vada Pav
A Gujarati steamed sponge cake! Light, airy and tempered with mustard seeds. 🔨 Dhok(Knock/press in some dialects) + 🎵 La(the musical note La!) = Dhok-La = Dhokla
The perfect Mumbai beach snack — puffed rice with chutneys! 🔔 Bhel(sounds exactly like Bell!) + 🎈 Puri(hollow balloon-sphere) = Bhel Puri
Crispy potato patties — Delhi's most popular street snack! 🥔 Aloo(Potato in Hindi) + 🪙 Tikki(coin-shaped patty) = Aloo Tikki
Vegetables in spiced batter, deep-fried to crispy perfection — perfect for a rainy day! 🎒 Pako(Pack/bundle) + ☀️ Ra(like Ra the sun god, or 'ra' suffix) = Pakora
Rich, savory broth with chewy noodles! ☀️ Ra(the Egyptian sun god!) + 👨 Men(also means 'noodles' in Japanese!) = Ra-Men = Ramen!
The name literally means 'Pick me up' in Italian! ⬆️ Tira(pull/lift in Italian) + 🫵 Mi(me) + ☕ Su(up) — coffee lifts your spirit = Tiramisu!
Originated in Austria, refined in France! ✝️ Crois(Cross in French — 'croix') + 😇 Sant(Saint in French) = Crois-Sant = Croissant!
Thailand's national dish! 📋 Pad(Notepad/Pad) + 👔 Thai(sounds exactly like a necktie = 'Thai'!) = Pad-Thai = Pad Thai!
Named after Hamburg
difficulty: Germany! 🏰 Burg(Castle/fortress in German — as in Ham-BURG!) + 🥩 Er(meat suffix) = Burg-Er = Burger!

fact: Cantonese for 'touch the heart'! Bite-sized dumplings in bamboo steamers for long brunches. 💫 Dim(點 = to touch/dot in Cantonese) + ❤️ Sum(心 = heart in Cantonese) = Dim Sum!
From the Middle East — deep-fried chickpea balls in a pita! 🎵 Fa(the 4th musical note, Do Re Mi FA) + 🎵 La(La!) + 🌿 Fel(herb/greenery) = Fa-La-Fel = Falafel! (like Fa La La!)
Layers of pasta, ragu and béchamel baked until golden! 🎵 La(musical note La!) + 😇 San(Saint, 'sant') + 👍 Ya(Yes!) = La-San-Ya = Lasagna!
Spain's most famous rice dish, loaded with seafood! 👨 Pa(Pa/Dad!) + 👩 Ella(She/Her in Spanish!) = Pa + Ella = Paella!
Prized for its crispy skin with thin pancakes and hoisin sauce. 👀 Peek(Peek-a-boo!) + 👑 King(King!) + 🦆 Duck = Peeking-King-Duck = Peking Duck!
Britain's most beloved takeaway! 🎣 Fish(Fishing rod) + 💻 Chips(Computer chips!) = Fish and Chips! (Not THOSE chips!)
Italian ice cream denser and more intense than regular ice cream! 🧊 Gela(Frozen/cold in Italian — gelato literally means 'frozen'!) + 🚶 To(To-go in Italian) = Gelato!
Vinegared rice with fresh seafood wrapped in seaweed! 🍶 Su(Vinegar in Japanese — the key ingredient!) + 🐟 Shi(Fish, 'shì' in Chinese) + 🎲 Roll = Su-Shi-Roll = Sushi Roll!
Mexico's most iconic street food in a folded corn tortilla! 🥩 Meat + 🌽 Corn(Taco shells are made of corn!) + 🌶️ Chili = Tacos! (Yes, we dodged the taco emoji!)

Created in 1889 for Italy's Queen Margherita! The colours match the Italian flag: red tomato, white mozzarella, green basil. 🍕 Pizza + 🌼 Margherita(Daisy flower in Italian — also a queen's name!) = Pizza Margherita!
Deep-fried milk solids soaked in cardamom & rose water syrup! 🌹 Gulab(Rose in Persian/Urdu — 'Gul'=flower) + 🫐 Jamun(Java plum berry — a real dark purple fruit!) = Gulab Jamun!
Elegant Italian dessert of coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream! ⬆️ Tira(Pull up!) + 🫵 Mi(Me!) + ☕ Su(Up — powered by espresso!) = Pick Me Up = Tiramisu!
A thick creamy filling on a crunchy graham cracker crust! 🧀 Cheese + 🎂 Cake = Cheesecake! (The simplest phonetic puzzle in history!)
Spanish fried dough sticks in cinnamon sugar with chocolate sauce! 🐑 Churra(a Spanish sheep breed whose RIBBED HORNS look exactly like churros!) + ⭕ Os(the circular cross-section) = Churros!
Middle Eastern pastry of filo dough, nuts and honey syrup! 🌋 Bak + LAVA(the word literally contains LAVA!) + 🍯 Honey = Bak-LAVA! = Baklava!
Delicate French almond meringue cookies! 🦜 Maca(Macaw — the vibrant parrot, just as colourful as macarons!) + 🏃 Rons(runs!) = Maca-Rons = Macarons!
Stack of fluffy griddle cakes with butter and maple syrup! 🍳 Pan(the pan it's cooked in!) + 🎂 Cakes = Pan-Cakes = Pancakes!
Dense, fudgy chocolate squares! 🟫 Brown(the colour — and their whole identity!) + 🍫 Chocolate = Brown-ies = Brownies!
As American as... well, you know! 🍎 Apple + 🔢 Pi(π = 3.14159... the mathematical constant! Pi sounds like Pie!) = Apple Pi(e)!
